label: Incident
description: Defines a random or scripted event - raid, disease, weather, visitor arrival, quest - that the storyteller system fires during play.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# IncidentWorker type that implements this incident's execution logic.

category.label: Category
category.description: IncidentCategoryDef that groups this incident for storyteller scheduling.

targetTags.label: Target tags
targetTags.description: List of IncidentTargetTagDef values that determine which map or world-object types this incident can target.

baseChance.label: Base chance
baseChance.description: Base relative weight for storyteller selection. Higher values make the incident more common.

baseChanceWithRoyalty.label: Base chance (Royalty)
baseChanceWithRoyalty.description: Overrides baseChance when the Royalty expansion is active. -1 means this field is inactive.

populationEffect.label: Population effect
populationEffect.description: How this incident's population reward is categorized for storyteller pacing.

earliestDay.label: Earliest day
earliestDay.description: The earliest in-game day (from game start) on which this incident can fire.

minPopulation.label: Min population
minPopulation.description: Minimum colony population required for this incident to fire.

requireColonistsPresent.label: Require colonists present
requireColonistsPresent.description: If true, the incident can only fire when at least one colonist is on the target map.

minRefireDays.label: Min refire days
minRefireDays.description: Minimum in-game days that must pass before this incident can fire again.

disabledWhen.label: Disabled when
disabledWhen.description: Difficulty flags that disable this incident when the corresponding option is active.

pointsScaleable.label: Points scaleable
pointsScaleable.description: If true, the storyteller scales threat points for this incident based on colony wealth and progress.

minThreatPoints.label: Min threat points
minThreatPoints.description: Minimum threat points required for this incident to fire. Leave unset to impose no minimum.

maxThreatPoints.label: Max threat points
maxThreatPoints.description: Maximum threat points at which this incident can fire. Leave unset to impose no cap.

allowedBiomes.label: Allowed biomes
allowedBiomes.description: Whitelist of BiomeDefs where this incident can fire. Mutually exclusive with disallowedBiomes.

disallowedBiomes.label: Disallowed biomes
disallowedBiomes.description: Blacklist of BiomeDefs where this incident cannot fire. Mutually exclusive with allowedBiomes.

tags.label: Tags
tags.description: String tags used for refire cross-checking and general incident grouping. Not translated.

refireCheckTags.label: Refire check tags
refireCheckTags.description: Incidents sharing any tag in this list count toward this incident's refire cooldown.

chanceFactorByPopulationCurve.label: Chance factor by population curve
chanceFactorByPopulationCurve.description: Multiplies baseChance based on colony population. X = population, Y = chance multiplier.

tale.label: Tale
tale.description: TaleDef recorded when this incident fires. Used by the tale recorder and art generation.

minAnomalyThreatLevel.label: Min anomaly threat level
minAnomalyThreatLevel.description: Minimum Anomaly threat level required for this incident. -1 means no requirement (non-Anomaly incident). Values 0–3 gate on the current threat level.

minGreatestPopulation.label: Min greatest population
minGreatestPopulation.description: Minimum value of the colony's all-time-greatest population required for this incident to fire. -1 means no requirement.

ignoreRecentSelectionWeighting.label: Ignore recent selection weighting
ignoreRecentSelectionWeighting.description: If true, the storyteller does not penalize this incident for having been selected recently. Private in source but used in shipped XML.

hidden.label: Hidden
hidden.description: If true, this incident is invisible in dev tools and scenario incident filters.

layerWhitelist.label: Layer whitelist
layerWhitelist.description: If non-empty, this incident can only occur on these PlanetLayerDefs (Odyssey expansion).

layerBlacklist.label: Layer blacklist
layerBlacklist.description: This incident cannot occur on any PlanetLayerDef in this list (Odyssey expansion).

canOccurOnAllPlanetLayers.label: Can occur on all planet layers
canOccurOnAllPlanetLayers.description: If true, this incident is eligible on every planet layer regardless of layer filters.

codexEntry.label: Codex entry
codexEntry.description: EntityCodexEntryDef that describes this incident in the Anomaly entity codex.

letterText.label: Letter text
letterText.description: Body text of the notification letter. Supports keyed translation and format arguments.

letterLabel.label: Letter label
letterLabel.description: Title line of the notification letter. Supports keyed translation and format arguments.

letterDef.label: Letter def
letterDef.description: LetterDef that controls the notification icon, sound, and urgency.

letterHyperlinkHediffDefs.label: Letter hyperlink hediff defs
letterHyperlinkHediffDefs.description: HediffDefs shown as clickable hyperlinks in the notification letter body.

letterSingularForm.label: Letter singular form
letterSingularForm.description: If true, the letter text uses singular grammar (one pawn affected rather than multiple).

pawnKind.label: Pawn kind
pawnKind.description: PawnKindDef used to generate a pawn for this incident (wanderer joins, stranger in black, etc.).

pawnMustBeCapableOfViolence.label: Pawn must be capable of violence
pawnMustBeCapableOfViolence.description: If true, only pawns capable of violence are eligible for the generated pawn slot.

pawnFixedGender.label: Pawn fixed gender
pawnFixedGender.description: Forces the generated pawn to a specific gender. None means gender is random.

pawnHediff.label: Pawn hediff
pawnHediff.description: HediffDef applied to the pawn generated by this incident.

gameCondition.label: Game condition
gameCondition.description: GameConditionDef started by this incident (heat wave, toxic fallout, aurora, etc.).

durationDays.label: Duration (days)
durationDays.description: Duration of the game condition started by this incident, in in-game days.

diseaseIncident.label: Disease incident
diseaseIncident.description: HediffDef that is the disease applied by this disease incident.

diseaseVictimFractionRange.label: Disease victim fraction range
diseaseVictimFractionRange.description: Fraction of eligible pawns that contract the disease. Sampled uniformly from this range.

diseaseMaxVictims.label: Disease max victims
diseaseMaxVictims.description: Hard cap on the number of pawns that can be infected by one firing of this disease incident.

diseaseBiomeRecords.label: Disease biome records
diseaseBiomeRecords.description: Per-biome commonality overrides for biome-specific disease selection.

diseasePartsToAffect.label: Disease parts to affect
diseasePartsToAffect.description: BodyPartDefs that the disease targets. When set, only those body parts are considered.

diseaseLethalLetterText.label: Disease lethal letter text
diseaseLethalLetterText.description: Additional letter text shown when the disease will be lethal without treatment.

diseaseDevelopmentStage.label: Disease development stage
diseaseDevelopmentStage.description: Developmental stages eligible for this disease. Comma-separated flags.

mechClusterBuilding.label: Mech cluster building
mechClusterBuilding.description: ThingDef for the ship part or mech cluster building dropped by this incident.

mtbDaysByBiome.label: MTB days by biome
mtbDaysByBiome.description: Per-biome mean time between firings (in days). Each child element name is a BiomeDef defName, value is the MTB in days.

questScriptDef.label: Quest script def
questScriptDef.description: QuestScriptDef that this incident launches when it fires.

treeDef.label: Tree def
treeDef.description: ThingDef for the tree plant spawned by a tree-spawn incident (Polux tree, harbinger tree).

treeGenStepDef.label: Tree gen step def
treeGenStepDef.description: GenStepDef used to scatter the tree grove on the map.

letterTextPlural.label: Letter text (plural)
letterTextPlural.description: Alternate letter body text used when multiple entities are involved (e.g., multiple harbinger trees).

treeGrowth.label: Tree growth
treeGrowth.description: Initial growth fraction (0–1) applied to the spawned trees.

basic-incident.label: Basic incident
basic-incident.description: Minimal incident: worker class, category, and at least one target tag.

disease-incident.label: Disease incident
disease-incident.description: A human disease incident with victim fraction and letter fields.
